ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry the company operates in */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  "hq_address" TEXT /* Headquarters address of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filings" (
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that submitted the filing */,
  "cik" INTEGER /* CIK number of the company */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the filing was submitted */,
  "filing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing type */,
  "long_term_outlook" INTEGER /* Long-term outlook of the company (0 or 1) */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue reported in the filing */,
  "net_income" TEXT /* Net income reported in the filing */,
  "total_assets" TEXT /* Total assets reported in the filing */,
  "total_liabilities" TEXT /* Total liabilities reported in the filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing the document belongs to */,
  "document_link" TEXT /* Link to the document */,
  "document_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document type */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filing_documents_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_categories" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the filing type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filings_year" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year of the filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filings_industry" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id", "filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filings_sector" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id", "filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filings_type" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing type */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id", "filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filings_yearly" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id", "filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_filings" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_filings" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the company submitted the filing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_sector" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id", "sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing that triggered the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filings_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "filing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing that was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filings_updates_filing_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_id") REFERENCES filings ("filing_id")
)
